data.name: LUST BET - Milf Edition
data.detailed_description:
Game Description for Steam

Welcome to the tantalizing world of Lust Bet - Milf Edition!

Step into a provocative card game where strategy meets seduction. Challenge three alluring MILFs—Carla, Shinobu, and Layla—each with distinct personalities, unique strategies, and wildly different reactions to victory and defeat. These confident, sophisticated women are here to test your wits, your nerve, and maybe even your composure.

Key Features:

  • Original Card Game Mechanics: A strategic and engaging card game that’s simple to learn but offers deep tactical gameplay.

  • Dynamic MILF Opponents: Experience the thrill of outsmarting three very different women, each with her own quirks and provocations.

  • High Replayability: Multiple reward levels, diverse personalities, and gameplay options ensure no two matches feel the same.

  • Versatile Gameplay Modes: Play intense 1v1 matches or turn up the heat by challenging two women at once.

Meet the Women:

  • Carla – The uninhibited womanCarla is a dominant, confident, and uninhibited woman. She uses her beauty as a weapon of seduction and enjoys playing with others' desires while maintaining control through provocation and mind games. She is bold, manipulative, and fully aware of her effect on people, often making them chase her attention. Her explicit language reveals a free and transgressive sexuality, with a strong inclination toward challenge. For her, infidelity is an act of rebellion and revenge, highlighting her impulsive and vengeful nature. She never hesitates or shows doubt, suggesting that pleasure and power are closely linked in her worldview. Behind her ostentatious confidence, there may be a hidden desire for self-affirmation or personal redemption.

  • Shinobu – The slightly shy
    Shinobu is playful, competitive, and slightly shy. She enjoys the thrill of winning but struggles with confidence, often appearing surprised by her own victories. She balances between excitement and embarrassment, particularly when things get more intimate. When losing, she becomes flustered and frustrated, but never truly gives up—she maintains a hopeful, determined attitude. Her reactions suggest a mix of innocence and curiosity, making her a character who is both charming and unpredictable. She enjoys teasing but also gets easily flustered when the tables turn.

  • Layla – Confident, witty, and bold.
    Layla is confident, witty, and bold. She embraces competition and isn't afraid to challenge her opponent with sharp remarks and a fearless attitude. Even in vulnerable situations, she keeps her composure, turning moments of weakness into playful taunts. Losing frustrates her, but she never lets it show too much—she maintains a cool, almost defiant attitude. She enjoys the game itself, treating it as an opportunity to assert her dominance and showcase her charisma. Layla is the type who plays to win but also knows how to make losing entertaining.

Lust Bet - Milf Edition is your chance to face off against strong, confident women who know exactly what they want. Can you outsmart them and take the upper hand, or will their charm and wit leave you stripped of more than just your cards?

Are you ready to place your bets?

data.short_description: **Challenge three alluring MILFs—Carla, Shinobu, and Layla—in a provocative card game where strategy meets seduction. Easy to learn, hard to master, with unique personalities, dynamic reactions, and high replayability. Will you outwit them or lose more than just your cards?**
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
